login.alertEmailRequiredMsg: Enter your email address in the field above, then tap "Forgot password".
login.alertEmailSentMsg: If this address is associated with an account, you will receive a link to reset your password.
login.alertEmailError: Unable to send email. Please try again in a moment.
login.alertPasswordShortMsg: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.forme_excellente: Excellent fitness — time to push hard.
dashboard.forme_legere: Good fitness — great day to train.
dashboard.forme_moderee: Average fitness — listen to your body and adjust intensity.
dashboard.forme_elevee: Low fitness — favour a light session or active rest.
dashboard.forme_critique: Very low fitness — rest is essential today.
dashboard.forme_consecutive: {{days}} days in a row without rest — recovery strongly recommended.
dashboard.emptyBody: Create your first plan with the AI assistant to start training.

plan.emptyPlanBody: Generate your first personalised training plan with the AI assistant.
plan.emptyMonthBody: No session is scheduled for this month. Navigate to another month or refresh your plan.

planManage.title: Manage plan
planManage.refreshDesc: I'll review your entire plan and adapt it to your current progress.
planManage.alertDeleteMsg: All associated sessions will be permanently deleted.

generate.incompleteProfile: Incomplete profile — your plan will be generic. Complete your profile for better results.
suggestions: Run a marathon in 16 weeks, 4 times/week
Prepare for a sprint triathlon in 12 weeks
generate.title: New plan
generate.description: Tell me your goal and I'll build a personalised plan in seconds.
generate.textAreaPlaceholder: E.g. I want to run a marathon in 16 weeks, 4 sessions/week. I've been running 3 times/week for 1 year.
generate.generatingSubtitle: I'm analysing your goal and creating your sessions
generate.leaveMsg: Your plan is being generated. If you leave now, the generation will be interrupted.
generate.ratingTitle: Does this plan work for you?

chat.initialMessage: Hello! I'm your AI coach. I can modify your plan, reschedule sessions, adjust volume or answer your questions. How can I help?
chat.noPlanMsg: Start by creating a plan so I can help you modify it.
chat.alertResetMsg: The conversation history will be cleared. Your plan stays intact.
chat.alertGenericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

session.alertWatchUnsupportedMsg: This sport requires watchOS 11 or later on your Apple Watch to be scheduled as a structured workout.
session.alertHealthError: Unable to save to Apple Health.
session.alertWatchCreated: The workout has been created in the Workout app on your Apple Watch.
session.alertWatchError: Unable to create workout on Apple Watch.
session.chatPlaceholder: Move to Friday, lighten the session…
session.alertGenericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

streakCelebration.subtitle_other: {{count}} days in a row. Keep it up!
streakCelebration.tagline_14: Two full weeks. You're picking up speed.

profile.userMetricsEmpty: No metrics yet — add VMA, FTP, weight…
profile.metricPickerEmpty: All your metrics are already set up.

profile.hkConnectedSubtitle: Your sessions will be recorded in the Health app.
profile.hkDisconnectedSubtitle: Record your sessions and read HR and VO2 max.

workoutManager.title: Apple Watch Workouts
workoutManager.emptyDesc: Workouts created from a session will appear here.
workoutManager.deleteConfirmMsg: This workout will be removed from the Fitness app.

welcome.title: Hey, I'm Fibi!
welcome.subtitle: I'm your AI sports coach — specialised in endurance, tailored plans and long-term progression.
welcome.line1: I build plans made for you, not everyone else.
welcome.line2: I adapt to your form and life's surprises, week after week.
welcome.line3: Running, yoga, strength training and more — tell me where you want to go.

objectifs_ask.bubble: What's your sports goal? A race to prepare for, getting back into training... or simply moving more?

objectifs.placeholder: e.g. finish a half-marathon in under 2 hours, prepare for an Ironman 70.3, get back into cycling after an injury…
objectifs.skip: I don't have a specific goal right now

niveau_ask.bubble: What's your current level? No judgement — I adapt to you, not the other way around.

recap.bubble: Here's what I know about you. You can update everything in your profile.

generate.bubble: Your profile is ready! I'm going to create your first personalised plan — it takes just a few seconds.

metriques_intro.bubble: To calibrate your sessions, I need a few numbers. Nothing complicated — here's what it looks like for a runner:
metriques_intro.example_result: With these 3 numbers, I can precisely calibrate the intensity of every session.

metriques.title: Your training data
metriques.subtitle: Leave blank anything you don't know — you can fill it in later.
metriques.fc_max_desc: Your HR during a maximum effort
metriques.note: You can update these at any time in your profile.

niveau.title: What is your current level?
niveau.subtitle: The AI adapts the volume and intensity of your plans based on your level.
niveau.débutant_desc: Getting back into sport or just starting out

profileBanner.text: Complete your profile for personalised plans

errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already in use.

errors.APPLE_EMAIL_REQUIRED: Sign in via Apple once to link your email address.
errors.INVALID_GOOGLE_TOKEN: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.GOOGLE_EMAIL_REQUIRED: Could not retrieve Google email. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.GENERATION_FAILED: Generation failed. Please try again in a moment.
errors.rateLimit: Limit reached — try again in a few minutes.
errors.rateLimitMinutes_one: Limit reached — try again in 1 minute.
errors.rateLimitMinutes_other: Limit reached — try again in {{count}} minutes.

planEnding.title: Continue your plan?
planEnding.subtitle: You're in the last week of your plan. Would you like to extend it?
planEnding.testSubtitle: Your last measurement was {{weeks}} weeks ago — a test will refine your progression.
planEnding.testSubtitleNoDate: No measurement recorded — a test will calibrate your sessions.
planEnding.successDetail: Fibi generated {{nb}} new session(s) tailored to your progression.
planEnding.errorMsg: Unable to extend the plan. Please try again.

recalibration.confirmMsg: {{nb}} sessions can be adjusted to your new value. Revise now?
recalibration.successDetail: {{nb}} sessions have been adjusted to your new performance.
recalibration.leaveMsg: The revision is in progress. If you leave now, it will be interrupted.

planRefresh.successDetail: Your plan has been updated by Fibi.
planRefresh.leaveMsg: The refresh is in progress. If you leave now, it will be interrupted.

warmupPopup.title: How do you want to start?
warmupPopup.subtitle: Some key metrics are missing. Your plan will use relative zones (Z1-Z5) until the test session.

directTest.title: Go straight to testing
directTest.description: We'll add a calibration session in week 1. You'll know your VMA/FTP/CSS right away and future sessions will be fully personalised.

baseFirst.title: Get fit first
baseFirst.description: 1 to 3 weeks in relative zones to ease back in, then a test session. Great if you're returning from a break or just starting out.

metricsPopup.title: Refine your plan
metricsPopup.subtitle: A few numbers to calibrate your sessions
metricsPopup.hint: Everything is optional — fill in what you know, skip the rest.

daysPopup.title: Your training days
daysPopup.subtitle: Fibi selected days that fit your request. Adjust if needed.

weeklyCheckin.title: Weekly check-in
weeklyCheckin.subtitle: 30 seconds to help Fibi adapt your training.
weeklyCheckin.successSubtitle: Fibi will take your data into account to adapt your plan.
weeklyCheckin.mondayBanner: Weekly check-in — how are you feeling?
